description: Register a new custom tool. Returns: 'tool {name} registered'. Once registered, the tool is added to the system prompt and available by name in all subsequent calls. The 'parameters' field must be a valid JSON Schema object defining the tool's arguments (see example). The 'command' field supports {param_name} placeholders that are replaced with actual parameter values at call time. Example: add_tool(name="weather", description="Get weather for a city", parameters={"type": "object", "properties": {"city": {"type": "string"}}}, command="curl wttr.in/{city}")
name: add_tool

name.description: Tool name (lowercase snake_case, used as identifier)

description.description: Description of what the tool does

command.description: Shell command template with {param_name} placeholders that get replaced by parameter values

parameters.description: JSON Schema for tool parameters. Example: {"type": "object", "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}}}
